title: Grilled Apricot Thai Chicken
description: Tender and juicy chicken breast marinated in a sweet and sour apricot sauce, then grilled to perfection. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together apricot jam, soy sauce, brown sugar, grated ginger, and minced garlic.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, stir-fry the citrusy stir-fry sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Once the chicken is cooked, brush with the stir-fry sauce and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
